description: Product Description Serve magical party drinks with these Dainty Unicorn Birthday Party Cups. Featuring a charming design of unicorns, rainbows, sunshine and flowers, these paper cups are perfect for your unicorn birthday party! Keep them stacked on your buffet table for guests to help themselves, or arrange them around the party table to add dreamy style to your table setting. As these cups are 100% plastic free, the great news is they are better for the environment too! Safety Warning No warning applicable
